name: Ghost QoL
author: t-Ghost-t
description: GhostQoL is a collection of many smaller quality-of-life mods packed into one, each independently toggleable in the settings menu.
- Learn Move Stats: Press LEFT on the Move Learn screen to see your Pokémon's full IVs and EVs.
- Pokedex Search: Adds a lightning-fast keyboard search to find any Pokémon by name in the Dex.
- Tutor.net Upgrade: Provides dynamic move info panels and STAB-highlighting for easy teaching.
- Battle Size Selector: Choose your preferred battle size (1v1, 2v2, 3v3) for encounters.
- Battle Move Info: View detailed move data during battle by pressing X.
- PC-Plus: Adds visual box renaming and bulk actions to the PC system.
- HUD Elements: A permanent onscreen PocketWatch and a quick-toggle for the Team Rocket disguise.
- Automation & Skips: Includes Slots AutoPlay, Intro Skip, and Hotel Multi-sleep options.
- More stuff I probably forgot to list.
